findings.location: s5 — Javaの実装例 コードコメント
findings.description: The Java code example in the source begins with an important warning comment that explicitly states SimpleDbTransactionManager is a framework-only class and application programmers should NOT write code using SimpleDbTransactionManager or SimpleDbTransactionExecutor directly. This warning is completely absent from the knowledge file's code example.
The PascalCase class name `BasicSqlStatementExceptionFactory` appears in the XML configuration in s5 content but is not listed in the s5 hints array.
